rider.style: Classic Rider-Waite-Smith tarot card, Pamela Colman Smith illustration style, 1909 vintage, ornate golden border, vibrant colors, detailed symbolism, mystical atmosphere

00.name: The Fool
00.prompt: young man in colorful jester clothes walking toward cliff edge, white dog at feet, yellow sky, sun shining, flowers falling from bundle, looking up carelessly

01.name: The Magician
01.prompt: man standing before table with sword, cup, wand, pentacle, infinity symbol above head, red robe, one hand pointing up, one pointing down

02.name: The High Priestess
02.prompt: woman sitting between two pillars B and J, blue robe, crescent moon at feet, scroll in lap, veil of pomegranates behind

03.name: The Empress
03.prompt: woman sitting on throne in nature, crown of twelve stars, holding scepter, lush garden, river flowing, wheat field

04.name: The Emperor
04.prompt: bearded man sitting on stone throne, ram heads on throne, red robe, holding orb and scepter, mountains in background

05.name: The Hierophant
05.prompt: religious figure sitting between two pillars, triple crown, holding triple cross, two monks kneeling before him, keys at feet

06.name: The Lovers
06.prompt: naked man and woman standing before angel Raphael, Tree of Knowledge with serpent, Tree of Life with flames, mountain background

07.name: The Chariot
07.prompt: warrior in armor standing in chariot drawn by black and white sphinxes, crown with star, city background, armor with alchemical symbols

08.name: Strength
08.prompt: woman gently closing lion's mouth, infinity symbol above head, white dress with flowers, calm expression, garden setting

09.name: The Hermit

11.name: Justice
11.prompt: woman sitting on throne holding sword in right hand, scales in left hand, crown, purple robe, pillar background

14.name: Temperance

15.name: The Devil

17.name: The Star
